memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: GitHub repository metadata for BRFSS 2015 diabetes indicators subset. Accession: swimmingbrain/decoding-diabetes. https://github.com/swimmingbrain/decoding-diabetes. Repository README describes a 2015 BRFSS-derived diabetes indicators dataset with 21 features such as BMI, age, income, smoking, physical activity, general health, high blood pressure, and cholesterol; not e-cigarette use or epilepsy.

CDC 2015 BRFSS questionnaire. Accession: 2015-brfss-questionnaire-12-29-14. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/questionnaires/pdf-ques/2015-brfss-questionnaire-12-29-14.pdf. Used only to verify that BRFSS 2015 had tobacco-related questionnaire content in the full survey, distinguishing the full instrument from the smaller diabetes-indicators subset.

Attempted direct raw GitHub mirror retrievals for BRFSS 2015 diabetes indicators CSV. Accession: retrieval-attempt-log. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/. All candidate direct-download attempts failed in this run; details saved as an artifact log.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
